query: SELECT id, company, LEFT(companyInfo, 300) as companyInfo_preview FROM deals WHERE tenantId = 1 LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kmzwkq9EWMaqpy.root --database PHTFs288hUf3yaW9yWMkJw --execute SELECT id, company, LEFT(companyInfo, 300) as companyInfo_preview FROM deals WHERE tenantId = 1 LIMIT 5;

rows.companyInfo_preview: Fortune 500 manufacturing company, 12,000 employees. Digital transformation initiative led by new CTO.
Mid-market SaaS company, 800 employees. Series C funded, rapid growth phase.
Analytics startup, 150 employees. Seed funded. Strong technical team.
Enterprise software company, 3,500 employees. Going through M&A process.

stdout:
id	company	companyInfo_preview
1	Acme Corp	Fortune 500 manufacturing company, 12,000 employees. Digital transformation initiative led by new CTO.
2	GlobalTech	Mid-market SaaS company, 800 employees. Series C funded, rapid growth phase.
3	Meridian Analytics	Analytics startup, 150 employees. Seed funded. Strong technical team.
4	Nexus Systems	Enterprise software company, 3,500 employees. Going through M&A process.
5	Velocity Commerce	E-commerce platform, 200 employees. Growing 40% YoY.
